analysis.summary_en: Mixed-to-risk-off tape with a sharp internal rotation. TAIEX -0.24% masks a violent split: TSMC dumped -2.21% on heavy volume while MediaTek ripped +7.39% and UMC surged +3.30%. The driver is clear — Nvidia Vera Rubin's pivot to LPDDR primary memory (Nanya win) plus Macronix's return to profit on tighter memory pricing has triggered a reallocation OUT of pure foundry leaders INTO memory and second-tier semis. The TSM/2330 ADR divergence (+2.84%) suggests TSMC weakness is local-flow driven (likely foreign sell into earnings/valuation), not fundamental — overnight ADR was actually up. UMC's -8.1% local/ADR divergence is the most interesting anomaly: locals bought what US sold.
analysis.summary_zh: 盤面偏避險但內部劇烈輪動。加權指數僅跌0.24%,但結構分歧巨大:台積電在大量下殺2.21%,聯發科卻暴漲7.39%,聯電大漲3.30%。主因明確 — Nvidia Vera Rubin平台轉向LPDDR主記憶體(南亞科切入),加上旺宏Q1轉盈確認記憶體價格上行,觸發資金從純晶圓代工龍頭輪出,流入記憶體與二線半導體。TSM與2330的ADR價差+2.84%顯示台積電的弱勢是本地賣壓(可能外資調節),非基本面問題 — 隔夜ADR實際上漲。聯電本地與ADR反向達-8.1%,是今日最值得注意的異常:本地買盤承接美國賣壓。

key_stories.headline_en: Nanya enters Nvidia Rubin LPDDR ecosystem via TSMC advanced packaging
key_stories.headline_zh: 南亞科透過台積電先進封裝合作切入Nvidia Rubin LPDDR供應鏈
key_stories.analysis_en: First Taiwanese DRAM maker into Nvidia AI server primary memory is a structural win for Nanya. The architectural shift from HBM-only to LPDDR for Rubin is significant — it broadens the AI memory TAM beyond Samsung/SK Hynix/Micron. MediaTek's +7.39% likely reflects sympathy buying as an AI ASIC/edge play benefiting from same Rubin cycle. Counter-intuitive that TSMC fell despite being the packaging partner — suggests the TSMC sell-off is unrelated (valuation/foreign flow) and the LPDDR story is the bullish catalyst for memory and fabless names.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 南亞科成為首家打入Nvidia AI伺服器主記憶體的台灣DRAM廠,具結構性意義。Rubin從純HBM架構轉向納入LPDDR,擴大了AI記憶體市場規模,不再侷限於三星/海力士/美光。聯發科暴漲7.39%反映同一Rubin週期的AI ASIC/邊緣運算題材聯想買盤。值得注意的是台積電身為封裝夥伴卻下跌,顯示台積電的弱勢與此題材無關(屬評價面或外資調節),LPDDR才是記憶體與IC設計族群的多頭催化劑。

key_stories.headline_en: Macronix returns to Q1 profit on tighter memory supply and higher ASPs
key_stories.headline_zh: 旺宏Q1轉盈,反映記憶體供給收緊與ASP上揚
key_stories.analysis_en: Confirms the memory upcycle thesis. Macronix profit + Nanya's Rubin win = a coherent narrative for Taiwan memory names today. NAND growth and inventory reduction are concrete data points, not hopium. This is why UMC (+3.3%) caught a bid despite its ADR being down 4.8% overnight — locals are repricing the entire second-tier semi complex on the memory/AI broadening thesis.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 確認記憶體上行循環論述。旺宏轉盈加上南亞科切入Rubin,構成今日台灣記憶體族群一致性題材。NAND成長與庫存下降是具體數據,非空泛預期。這也解釋了為何聯電在ADR隔夜跌4.8%的情況下本地仍漲3.3% — 本地資金正基於記憶體/AI擴散論述,重新評價整個二線半導體族群。

key_stories.headline_en: TSMC -2.21% on heavy volume despite positive ADR overnight
key_stories.headline_zh: 台積電量增下跌2.21%,但隔夜ADR實際上漲
key_stories.analysis_en: Mechanism: likely foreign institutional profit-taking and rotation INTO memory/MediaTek, not a fundamental TSMC negative. ADR was +0.63% — if there were bad TSMC-specific news, ADR would have led down. The 2.84% divergence is the largest non-fundamental signal of the day. Watch for mean reversion if foreign flow normalizes. FALSIFIED IF: tomorrow brings specific TSMC negative news (capex cut, major customer order pull, geopolitical action) that retroactively justifies today's selling.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 機制判斷:應為外資獲利了結並輪動至記憶體/聯發科,非台積電基本面利空。ADR實際漲0.63% — 若有台積電個別利空,ADR會領跌。2.84%的價差是今日最大的非基本面訊號,若外資流向正常化,可能均值回歸。反證條件:明日若出現針對台積電的具體利空(資本支出下修、大客戶砍單、地緣政治措施)能事後合理化今日賣壓,則此判斷錯誤。

key_stories.headline_en: Taiwan Q1 exports hit record US$195.74B, +51.1% YoY
key_stories.headline_zh: 台灣Q1出口創歷史新高1957.4億美元,年增51.1%
key_stories.analysis_en: Macro tailwind underpinning the entire complex. 2026 full-year forecast >US$800B. This makes the TAIEX-only-down-0.24% resilience make sense despite TSMC's drag. The AI export thesis is intact and broadening — supportive of rotation, not exit.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 整體大盤的總經順風。2026年全年預估突破8000億美元。這也解釋了為何台積電大跌,加權指數僅跌0.24%的韌性。AI出口題材完好且正在擴散 — 支持資金輪動而非撤離。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: ADR up, local down hard — classic local-flow-driven sell, not fundamental. Highest-conviction divergence today. If foreign flow normalizes Tuesday, mean reversion likely. Falsifier: TSMC-specific bad news emerging in next 24h.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: ADR上漲、本地大跌 — 典型本地賣壓主導,非基本面。今日信心度最高的價差訊號。若外資流向週二恢復,有望均值回歸。反證:未來24小時出現台積電個別利空。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Most extreme divergence: ADR -4.8% overnight, local +3.3%. Locals are buying memory/AI broadening thesis aggressively. Risk: ADR weakness may have reflected real news (foundry pricing, China exposure) that locals haven't fully digested. Watch tomorrow's open closely — if local catches down to ADR, the rally was a fade trap.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 今日最極端價差:ADR隔夜跌4.8%,本地反漲3.3%。本地資金積極押注記憶體/AI擴散題材。風險:ADR弱勢可能反映本地尚未消化的真實利空(代工報價、中國曝險)。明日開盤需密切觀察 — 若本地補跌至ADR水位,今日漲勢即為誘多陷阱。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: ADR down 3.59%, local flat. Local likely catches down tomorrow unless OSAT news (Amkor's strong Q1, ASE cyber MOU) provides offsetting bid. Lean cautious on 3711.TW into next session.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: ADR跌3.59%,本地持平。除非封測題材(艾克爾Q1強勁、日月光資安MOU)提供承接買盤,否則本地明日恐補跌。對3711.TW次盤偏向謹慎。
